prompt: Integrate this Venn diagram to the whiteboard.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the whiteboard) by integrating the Venn diagram from image 2 onto its surface. Replicate the visual style of the Venn diagram from image 2, including its specific red, green, and blue colors, three-circle configuration, and semi-transparent overlapping regions. Place the diagram centrally on the whiteboard, ensuring it is clearly visible and appropriately sized.
objects: Venn diagram centrally placed on the whiteboard
